original: 1. SAFE BEARING CAPACITY CONSIDERED IS 100 T/M�  AS PER GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT'S  REPORT.\P2. IF THE FOUNDING STRATA IS SHALLOWER OR DEEPER THAN THE MINIMUM  SPECIFIED, SAME SHOULD      \P    BE  BROUGHT TO THE NOTICE OF GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT AND STRUCTURAL CONSULTANT.\P3. FOUNDING STRATA SHOULD BE CHECKED AND APPROVED BY THE GEOTECHNICAL  CONSULTANT     \P    BEFORE LAYING FOUNDATION.\P4. FOR EXCAVATION AND FOUNDATION REFER GUIDELINE NOTES IN GENERAL DETAIL.\P5. FOR FOUNDATION EXCAVATION SLOPE SHOULD BE MAINTAIN  1:1. IF 1:1 SLOPE IS  NOT POSSIBLE     \P    THEN IT SHOULD BE GET INTO OBSERVATION OF GEOTECHNICAL   CONSULTANT BEFORE STARTING \P    THE EXCAVATIONS.\P6. COVER FOR FOOTING = 75MM.\P7. EXCAVATION POCKETS ON WHICH STRUCTURAL MEMBERS SUCH AS RAFT / FOOTING / OR ANY \P    STRUCTURAL STITCHED RAFTS REST SHOULD BE FILLED UP  WITH PCC / PLUM CONCRETE.\P8. EXCAVATION SLOPE OF LEVEL DIFFERENCES WHERE FOOTINGS / RAFT / STITCHED RAFTS REST \P    SHOULD BE APPROVED BY SOIL CONSULTANTS.\P9. WATER LEVEL NEED TO BE CONFIRMED FROM GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT AS PER SITE CONDITION.\P10. LEVEL DIFFERENCE BETWEEN FOOTINGS SHOULD BE AS PER GENERAL DETAIL.\P11. LAPS IF PROVIDED SHOULD BE STAGGERED OTHERWISE TAKE LAP LENGTH 1.4 x Ld.\P12. CASTING OF RETAINING WALL MUST BE DONE FOR  A 15m. STRETCH (MAX.), AFTER WHICH   THERE  \P      SHOULD BE A 1m. GAP. THIS GAP SHOULD  ONLY BE CAST AFTER 28 DAYS. THIS GAP   IS TO  REDUCE \P      SHRINKAGE CRACKS WHICH MAY LEAD TO WATER PERCOLATION THROUGH WALL.\P13.  WATERPROOFING CONSULTANT SHOULD BE REFERRED TO FOR WATERPROOFING DETAILS OF        \P      RAFT AND BASEMENT RETAINING WALL.\P\P\P\P

ANY AMBIGUITY, IF FOUND, SHALL BE BROUGHT TO THE NOTICE \P4.	OF THE CONSULTANTS BEFORE EXECUTION OF THE WORK.\P5.	SUPERVISION SHALL NOT BE OUR RESPONSIBILITY.\P6.	CURING OF CONCRETE MEMBERS SHALL BE CARRIED OUT FOR A MINIMUM PERIOD OF 12 DAYS AFTER CASTING BY PONDING OR COVERING SURFACE BY JUTE BAGS KEPT CONSTANTLY WET OR SUCH OTHER MEANS.\P7.	CONTRACTOR SHALL TAKE CARE OF ALL UNDER GROUND UTILITIES OF CIVIL, MECHANICAL, ELECTRICAL AND OTHER   SERVICES AS THEY \P8.	INTERFACE WITH STRUCTURAL FOUNDATIONS AND OTHER UNDERGROUND WORKS.\P9.	SAND/EARTH FILLING SHALL BE DONE SIMULTANEOUSLY BOTH SIDE OF WALL.{\C3;\P}10.	LAP LENGTH SHALL BE FOR BEAMS 50 TIMES DIA. OF BARS & FOR SLAB 100 TIMES DIA. OF BARS
